metadata.title: Andreas Hilgers - Engineering Manager & Senior Full-Stack Developer
metadata.description: Professional portfolio of Andreas Hilgers, an Engineering Leader and Senior Full-Stack Developer with 20+ years of experience in digital transformation, software architecture, and AI integration.
metadata.ogTitle: Andreas Hilgers | Engineering Management & Tech Leadership
metadata.ogDescription: Scaling digital platforms and leading high-performing engineering teams with 20+ years of expertise.

hero.name: Andreas Hilgers
hero.description: Over 20 years of experience designing, building, and scaling digital platforms, APIs, and high-traffic SaaS applications. Expert in leading cross-functional teams and driving end-to-end digital transformation.
hero.subdescription: Bridging the gap between business objectives and technical excellence while delivering scalable, secure, and maintainable solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Engineering Leadership & Technical Excellence
about.description: I am a Senior Full-Stack Developer and Engineering Leader with a career spanning over two decades. My expertise lies in architecting robust digital ecosystems and leading teams through complex technical challenges. I have a proven track record of modernizing legacy systems and scaling high-traffic applications. Currently, I am focused on advancing the frontiers of vibe coding and agentic development, integrating cutting-edge AI services into production-grade environments.
about.quote: Delivering excellence by bridging the gap between business strategy and scalable software architecture.

experience.title: Professional Journey & Education
experience.subtitle: Two decades of technical leadership, innovation, and continuous learning

items.description: Strategically developed the engineering organization. Leading the technological vision with a focus on scalability and innovation.
Leading digitalization initiatives and technical leadership of the development team in a hybrid environment.
Certification with a focus on agile methodologies and efficient team collaboration.

items.position:
Project Management
Designing and Managing Projects
items.description: Advanced strategic management skills for international IT projects.
State-certified vocational training with a focus on software engineering and architecture.
Long-term responsibility for web technologies and global software infrastructures within a fully remote team.
Founding and building an agency for bespoke B2B solutions with a focus on Cloud and Mobile.
Entering professional software development with a focus on database-driven web applications.
Sound technical foundation including advanced technical college entrance qualification.
